articles.author: Lauren Forristal
articles.title: How to use Google’s new AI agents to go beyond your standard searches - TechCrunch
articles.description: Google is launching AI-powered “information agents” that can monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates and changes.
articles.content: At the Google I/O 2026 keynote, the tech giant revealed new agentic capabilities in Search, where users can create, customize, and manage multiple AI agents to stay updated on topics of interest. The… [+2776 chars]
